query: SELECT v.id, v.nome, v.gestorId, COUNT(lv.id) as totalLojasAtribuidas FROM volantes v LEFT JOIN loja_volante lv ON v.id = lv.volanteId GROUP BY v.id, v.nome, v.gestorId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT v.id, v.nome, v.gestorId, COUNT(lv.id) as totalLojasAtribuidas FROM volantes v LEFT JOIN loja_volante lv ON v.id = lv.volanteId GROUP BY v.id, v.nome, v.gestorId;
